goal: Demonstrate that forbidden-file changes cause the boundary check to fail. This PR creates the negative test task file, updates the workflow to detect tasks dynamically, and adds a regression test for forbidden boundary violations.
acceptance_criteria: .agent/tasks/002-negative-boundary.json exists and lists exactly the three files changed in this PR as allowed
.github/workflows/agent-boundary.yml detects changed task files dynamically instead of hardcoding 001-agent-smoke.json
.agent/tasks/002-negative-boundary.json validation passes against the PR changes
A forbidden change to Dockerfile causes the boundary check to exit non-zero with a FORBIDDEN_CHANGED error
